description: Stationary block bootstrap on monthly return records from the quarterly-rebalanced strategy and benchmark with expected block length 6 periods.
Univariate GARCH(1,1) Monte Carlo calibrated on monthly net returns from the quarterly-rebalanced strategy.
Moderate stress Monte Carlo with 1.5x conditional volatility on top of the calibrated GARCH path.
Severe stress Monte Carlo with 2x conditional volatility on top of the calibrated GARCH path.
